svg.title: A map of the southern latitudes of the Pacific Ocean, between Australia and the southern part of South America, showing the path of the Spray between Tierra del Fuego and the Eastern coast of Australia. This leg of the voyage took approximately three months, and the map shows the boat’s intermediate stops at Juan Fernandez, St. Felix, the Marquesas, Samoa and surrounding islands, before reaching the Australian mainland. The map also shows the prevailing winds during this part of the journey.
